rendering_standard: SVG inline, viewBox 400x300 minimum, aria-label required, answer NEVER encoded in visual

visual_generators.description: Horizontal number line from 0 to 3; equal-sized segments matching the divisor fraction are marked; total is shaded — Mathlete counts how many segments fit
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Number of segments NOT labeled or annotated — Mathlete counts from visual

visual_generators.description: Number line from −15 to 15 with integers labeled; a point and its reflection (opposite) are shown as open circles

svg_params.point_b: opposite — shown as open circle, unlabeled

visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Opposite point is drawn but NOT labeled — Mathlete names it

visual_generators.description: Number line with a point marked; a double-headed arrow from 0 to the point shows distance — Mathlete reads the absolute value
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Arrow shows the distance visually; numeric distance NOT labeled

visual_generators.description: Number line showing 3–5 rational numbers plotted as labeled points; Mathlete orders them

svg_params.points: 3-5 randomized rationals (mix of fractions, decimals, integers)
svg_params.labels: each point labeled with its fraction/decimal form

visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Points are randomly positioned on line (not pre-sorted); Mathlete writes order

visual_generators.description: Full 4-quadrant coordinate plane (−10 to 10 on both axes) with one or more labeled or unlabeled points

svg_params.quadrant_labels: I, II, III, IV in corners

visual_generators.format_hint_rule: For name-coordinates tasks, point is plotted with NO coordinate label

visual_generators.description: Two points with the same x-coordinate or same y-coordinate plotted; segment connecting them shown; Mathlete computes distance

svg_params.point_b: same shared coordinate as A, different other coordinate

visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Segment drawn but NOT labeled with length — Mathlete uses absolute value

visual_generators.description: HTML-rendered 2-column ratio table (x, y) with 4 rows; one cell is blank — Mathlete fills the missing equivalent ratio
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Blank cell shows '?'; no visible formula or pattern hint

visual_generators.description: Two parallel number lines aligned at 0; top line shows one quantity (e.g., miles), bottom shows the other (e.g., hours); one value missing
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Missing value shown as '?' on appropriate tick; equivalent ratio relationship NOT annotated

visual_generators.description: Number line from −5 to 20 showing a simple inequality graph (open/closed circle + arrow); Mathlete identifies or matches the inequality
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Inequality symbol NOT shown on graph — Mathlete reads and writes the matching inequality

visual_generators.description: Side-by-side display: a table of (x, y) values and a coordinate graph in the first quadrant showing the plotted points and line
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Equation NOT shown on graph or table; Mathlete analyzes relationship

visual_generators.description: Labeled triangle with base and height marked (including height for obtuse triangles drawn outside the triangle); one value as '?'
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Formula NOT shown on diagram; height clearly distinguished from slant side

visual_generators.description: Labeled parallelogram with base, height (perpendicular, drawn as dashed line), and slant side; one value as '?'
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: CRITICAL: slant side included as a distractor; height is the perpendicular dashed line, NOT the slant

visual_generators.description: Labeled trapezoid with both parallel bases (b₁ and b₂), height, and right angle markers on the height
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: b₁ and b₂ labeled explicitly; height clearly perpendicular to both bases

visual_generators.description: Unfolded net of a rectangular or triangular prism with all faces labeled with dimensions
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: Individual face areas NOT pre-computed on diagram; Mathlete sums them

visual_generators.description: Horizontal box-and-whisker plot on a labeled number line; five-number summary values either shown as tick labels or partially hidden
visual_generators.format_hint_rule: For read tasks, the target stat is NOT labeled — Mathlete reads from position on number line
